name: tapcontroller
description: Turn your phone into a game controller for PC

scripts.prebuild: npm run build:helper && powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name TapController -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force dist -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
scripts.build:helper: pyinstaller --onefile --collect-all vgamepad --distpath tools --workpath build_py --specpath build_py tools/gamepad_helper.py
scripts.postinstall: echo Setup complete. ViGEmBus installer will be run automatically during the app installation.
